chatgpt.notes: Set environment variable OPENAI_API_KEY. Get your API key from https://platform.openai.com/api-keys

gemini.notes: Set environment variable GEMINI_API_KEY. Get your API key from https://makersuite.google.com/app/apikey

perplexity.notes: Set environment variable PERPLEXITY_API_KEY. Get your API key from https://www.perplexity.ai/settings/api

anthropic.notes: Set environment variable ANTHROPIC_API_KEY. Get your API key from https://console.anthropic.com/settings/keys

grok.notes: Set environment variable GROK_API_KEY. Get your API key from https://console.x.ai/

manus.notes: Set environment variable MANUS_API_KEY. Manus browser automation conversations

security.warning: API keys are loaded from Windows environment variables. Never commit actual keys to version control.
security.setup_instructions: Set environment variables using: setx OPENAI_API_KEY "your-key-here" (requires restart) or System Properties > Environment Variables for permanent setup
